spam.subject: CONGRATULATIONS! You've won $1,000,000!!!
spam.body:
Dear lucky winner,

You have been selected as the grand prize winner of our international lottery! Click here to claim your prize immediately. Reply with your bank details to process the transfer.

Best regards,
Lottery Team

spam.subject: Limited time offer - Buy 2 get 10 FREE!!!
spam.body:
AMAZING DEAL JUST FOR YOU!

For the next 24 hours only, you can buy 2 of our premium supplements and get 10 FREE! This offer expires soon!

Click here: http://bit.ly/amazing-deal-now

Unsubscribe: http://spam-list.xyz/remove

spam.subject: Your account has been suspended - Verify NOW
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your account has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. Please verify your identity immediately by clicking the link below and entering your password.

Verify Now: http://secure-verify.phishing.com/login

If you do not verify within 24 hours, your account will be permanently deleted.

spam.subject: Work from home and earn $5000/week!
spam.body:
Hi there,

Are you tired of your 9-to-5 job? Our proven system lets you work from home and earn $5000 per week with just 2 hours of work daily!

No experience needed. Click here to start today!

http://work-from-home-scam.xyz

inquiry.subject: Question about your product pricing
inquiry.body:
Hello,

I came across your company's website and I'm interested in learning more about your enterprise software solutions. Could you please send me a pricing sheet for the professional tier?

I'm also wondering if you offer volume discounts for teams larger than 50 people.

Thank you for your time,
{sender_name}

inquiry.subject: Inquiry: Integration with Salesforce
inquiry.body:
Hi there,

I'm evaluating your platform for our team of 30 sales reps. Before we proceed, I need to know:

1. Does your product integrate natively with Salesforce?
2. What is the typical implementation timeline?
3. Do you provide dedicated onboarding support?

We're planning to make a decision by end of quarter.

Thanks,
{sender_name}
{title} at {company}

inquiry.subject: Question about your return policy
inquiry.body:
To Whom It May Concern,

I recently purchased order #ORD-{order_id} and would like to understand your return policy before deciding whether to keep the item.

Specifically, I have questions about:
- The 30-day return window
- Whether I need the original packaging
- How refunds are processed

Please let me know at your earliest convenience.

Best,
{sender_name}

inquiry.subject: Availability of {product_name}
inquiry.body:
Hello,

I'm interested in purchasing {product_name} but I noticed it shows as 'out of stock' on your website. Do you know when it will be back in stock?

Alternatively, is there a similar product you would recommend?

Thank you,
{sender_name}

complaint.subject: Unacceptable service - Order #{order_id} still not received
complaint.body:
To the Customer Service Team,

I placed order #{order_id} over THREE WEEKS AGO and it has still not arrived. I have contacted your support team twice already and received nothing but automated responses.

This is completely unacceptable. I need this issue resolved IMMEDIATELY or I will be forced to dispute the charge with my credit card company and leave a negative review.

Expected delivery was {expected_date}. Today is {today_date}.

I demand a response within 24 hours.

{sender_name}

complaint.subject: Product arrived damaged
Billing error on my account

order.subject: Order confirmation needed - Enterprise License
Request to modify existing order #{order_id}
Bulk order inquiry - Q4 stock
order.body:
Dear Sales Team,

We are preparing our Q4 inventory and would like to place a bulk order for the following:

- {product_1}: 200 units
- {product_2}: 150 units
- {product_3}: 100 units

Could you please provide:
1. Bulk pricing for quantities listed
2. Estimated lead time
3. Available shipping options

We need delivery by {deadline_date} to meet our holiday season requirements.

Best,
{sender_name}
{title}, {company}

support.subject: Cannot log into my account
support.body:
Hi Support,

I've been trying to log into my account for the past hour and keep getting an error message: 'Invalid credentials'.

I've already tried:
1. Resetting my password (link from reset email doesn't work)
2. Clearing browser cache
3. Trying a different browser

My account email is {account_email}

I have a meeting in 2 hours where I need to access my data. Please help urgently.

Thank you,
{sender_name}

support.subject: Software crash - data loss concern
How do I export my data?
support.body:
Hello,

I've been using your service for about 6 months and I want to export all my data to do an analysis in Excel.

I looked through the settings menu and the help docs but couldn't figure out how to do a full data export.

Could you please walk me through the steps?

Thanks,
{sender_name}

feedback.subject: Feedback on recent update
feedback.body:
Hi Team,

I wanted to share some feedback on the recent v{version} update.

Positives:
- The new dashboard is much cleaner
- Performance seems improved
- Love the new export feature

Areas for improvement:
- The keyboard shortcut for undo changed and it's confusing
- The mobile version seems slower than before
- Would love dark mode

Overall, great update! Keep up the good work.

Best,
{sender_name}

feedback.subject: Feature request: API access
feedback.body:
Hello,

I'm a long-time customer ({years} years) and power user. I'd like to formally request API access for your platform.

Use case: I want to automatically sync data from your platform to our internal BI tools.

I'd be happy to join a beta program if you're developing this feature.

Thank you for considering,
{sender_name}
{title}

billing.subject: Invoice #{invoice_id} - Payment Question
billing.body:
Dear Billing Team,

I received invoice #{invoice_id} dated {invoice_date} for ${amount}.

I have a few questions:
1. The line item '{item_name}' - what does this cover?
2. Is early payment discount available?
3. Can you accept payment via ACH transfer?

Our payment terms are Net-30 but we'd like to pay sooner if there's a discount.

Thank you,
{sender_name}
Accounts Payable, {company}

billing.subject: Urgent: Subscription cancellation request
billing.body:
Hello,

I am writing to formally request the cancellation of my subscription (Account: {account_id}) effective immediately.

Reasons for cancellation:
- Cost is too high for our current budget
- We are switching to a different provider

Please confirm:
1. When the subscription will end
2. Whether we will receive a prorated refund
3. How to export our data before access is removed

Kindly process this as soon as possible.

{sender_name}
